Section 1: The Basics – Why AC Repair Matters in Mumbai

Mumbai’s tropical climate means your AC works overtime – often 10–12 hours a day during summer. Humidity, dust, and voltage fluctuations take a toll on every component. Yet many homeowners only call a technician when cooling stops entirely.

Common myths:

  1. “My AC needs gas every year.” – False. A properly sealed system should hold gas for years. Frequent refills indicate a leak.
  2. “Any technician can fix any brand.” – Not always. Brands like Voltas, Daikin, and LG have unique parts and service requirements.
  3. “A cheap service is just as good.” – Cutting corners often leads to repeated breakdowns and hidden costs.

Regular maintenance and prompt repair extend your AC’s life, lower electricity bills, and ensure clean, healthy air.



Section 2: Key Factors & Service Types (with Pricing Table)

When searching for ac repair near me, you’ll encounter various services. Below is a breakdown of common AC services and their typical price ranges in Mumbai – based on ProFixer’s actual service records from the last 12 months.



Standard AC Service

Filter cleaning, coil wash, drain check

399 – 799

AC Gas Filling (R22)

Refrigerant recharge + leak inspection

1,500 – 2,500

AC Gas Filling (R32 / R410A)

Refrigerant recharge + leak inspection

2,500 – 4,000

Capacitor Replacement

Diagnosis + part

1,200 – 2,200

PCB / Circuit Board Repair

Repair or replacement

1,500 – 5,000

Fan Motor Replacement

Indoor or outdoor fan motor

2,500 – 4,500
